plan_type_rationale: Targeted branch operation with known root cause; no broad discovery needed

phases.name: Audit, fix, restamp, reindex
phases.gate: All tasks in Phase 1 complete; rag-index reports chunks_skipped < 2705 (header gate passing for at least some nodes)

tasks.description: Locate the --source-headers implementation in populate-coderef CLI source. Find where @semantic blocks are stamped. Confirm the exact output format emitted.
tasks.success_criteria: Source file and line number identified; stamped format confirmed as @semantic (wrong) vs @coderef-semantic: X.Y.Z (needed)

tasks.description: Update --source-headers stamper to emit @coderef-semantic: 1.0.0 format that matches SEMANTIC_MARKER_RE in semantic-header-parser.ts L43. The new block must include: version (1.0.0), and preserve exports/used_by data in the correct grammar.
tasks.success_criteria: Source updated; tsc clean (or build passes); new stamp format matches /@coderef-semantic\s*:\s*([0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+)/

tasks.description: Strip old @semantic blocks from all source files on the branch. Run: node -e script or a targeted strip pass. Verify no @semantic blocks remain.
tasks.success_criteria: grep -r '@semantic' src/ returns 0 results (or only @coderef-semantic results)

tasks.description: npx populate-coderef . -- to rebuild graph.json with corrected --source-headers. Check headerStatus distribution on file-grain nodes.
tasks.success_criteria: headerStatus: present > 0 on file-grain nodes; no nodes with headerStatus: missing (or missing count reduced from 370)

tasks.description: npx rag-index -- to rebuild vectors. Capture: chunks_indexed, chunks_skipped, skip reasons.
tasks.success_criteria: chunks_indexed > 0 (header gate now passing). chunks_skipped reason=header_status_missing should be 0 or greatly reduced. Embedding failures (OpenAI key) are pre-existing non-blocking.

tasks.description: Commit changes to feature/source-headers-dogfood: updated stamper source + any build artifacts. Push branch.
tasks.success_criteria: Commit on feature/source-headers-dogfood, pushed to remote

tasks.description: git checkout main (return to main branch after validation)
tasks.success_criteria: Back on main branch, working tree clean
